arts.ttl: FC Porto make contact to sign West Ham player in deadline day deal
arts.sum: FC Porto have made contact with West Ham United regarding a deal for Luís Guilherme, with the Brazilian seriously struggling for minutes with the Hammers. The 18-year-old has had just 50 minutes of senior action this season and his camp will probably believe he needs more than that to aid his development. O Jogo report The post FC Porto make contact to sign West Ham player in deadline day deal appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Man City Deadline Day Rumours: Champions to bolster midfield with FC Porto star?
arts.sum: Manchester City were pulverised at the Emirates Stadium on Sunday. Despite pulling level shortly after the restart, City capitulated to fall to a 5-1 loss at Arsenal. City are now 15 points off first-...

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Man City lowball Porto in Nico Gonzalez pursuit
arts.sum: Manchester City are hoping to finalise a Deadline Day deal for Nico Gonzalez, but FootballTransfers understands they are yet to reach an agreement with Porto . Barcelona crucially included a 40% sell-on clause when they offloaded Gonzalez to Porto and Martin Anselmi’s side are therefore eager to maximise the Spaniard’s transfer fee.

arts.ttl: Porto insist Man City must meet €60m release clause for midfielder
arts.sum: FC Porto are insisting that Nico Gonzalez will not be allowed to join Manchester City unless the midfielder’s €60m release clause is met. City have made Gonzalez their top target to reinforce in midfield and are working on a deal before the deadline. Pep Guardiola is desperate to bring in a new midfielder, with City […] The post Porto insist Man City must meet €60m release clause for midfielder first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.sum: Manchester City are hopeful of concluding a Deadline Day deal for Porto midfielder Nico Gonzalez.

arts.ttl: Man City interested in signing Porto's Gonzalez
arts.sum: Sources in Portugal say City have already had a bid turned down for the 23-year-old former Barcelona player.

arts.ttl: Man City discussing £30m fee for Porto midfielder as Pep Guardiola's side look to continue adding to their squad in bid to save their season
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Manchester City are discussing a fee of around £30million for a Porto midfielder. The player has a release clause of £50million. .
